mano_cua.result_summary: 日期时间选择器重置功能正常。选择April 9后输入框显示'09-04-2026 14:20:17'，全选删除后输入框恢复'Choose a date...'占位符，日历面板中之前选中的9号不再高亮，重置成功。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The test has been completed successfully. The reset/clear functionality works correctly. After manually clearing the input content (triple-click + Backspace), the datetime picker successfully resets its internal state - the previously selected date (April 9, 2026) is no longer retained, input shows placeholder, and the calendar panel shows no highlighted/selected date.
